phrases.intent_en: Ask where La Grande Épicerie food hall is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve La Grande Épicerie, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah GRAHND ay-pee-suh-REE, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: La Grande Épicerie de Paris is the luxury food hall adjacent to Le Bon Marché on Rue de Sèvres. It sells exceptional French and international products — cheeses, charcuterie, pastries, wine, and prepared foods. It's one of the best food halls in the world and worth visiting even if you're not buying.

responses.english: La Grande Épicerie is in the building across the street.
responses.phonetic: lah grahnd ay-pee-suh-REE eh dahn luh bah-tee-MAHN dahn fass, duh loh-tr koh-TAY duh lah roo
responses.local: La Grande Épicerie est dans le bâtiment d'en face, de l'autre côté de la rue.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the women's designer section is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le rayon mode femme créateurs ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh ray-YOHN mohd FAM kray-ah-TUR
phrases.cultural_note: Le Bon Marché was founded in 1852 and is the oldest department store in Paris. It's less touristy than Galeries Lafayette or Printemps, with a more curated, Left Bank aesthetic. The store carries a discerning selection of luxury French and international designers across multiple floors.

responses.english: Women's designers are on the first floor.
responses.phonetic: lay kray-ah-TUHR fam sohn toh pruh-MYAY ay-TAHZH
responses.local: Les créateurs femme sont au premier étage.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the tax refund process for non-EU visitors
phrases.text_local: Comment fonctionne le remboursement de TVA pour les visiteurs hors UE ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN fohnk-SYOHN luh ruhm-boors-MAHN duh tay-vay-AH poor lay vee-zee-TUR OR oo-AY
phrases.cultural_note: Non-EU visitors can claim a VAT refund (détaxe) on purchases over €100.01 in a single store. Le Bon Marché has a dedicated tax refund desk. You need your passport and the refund forms (bordereau de vente à l'exportation) completed by the store, then validated at the airport.

responses.english: The tax refund desk is on the ground floor. Bring your passport.
responses.phonetic: luh boo-ROH duh day-TAHKS eh toh ray-duh-shoh-SAY. ah-por-TAY votr pahs-POR
responses.local: Le bureau de détaxe est au rez-de-chaussée. Apportez votre passeport.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a personal shopping service
phrases.text_local: Proposez-vous un service de personal shopping ?
phrases.pronunciation: proh-poh-ZAY voo uhn sehr-VEES duh per-soh-NAL shop-PEENG
phrases.cultural_note: Le Bon Marché offers a complimentary personal shopping service where a stylist helps you navigate the store and find items that match your needs and budget. This is particularly useful for the luxury goods and designer sections and available in multiple languages.

responses.english: Yes, personal shopping is by appointment on the second floor.
responses.phonetic: wee, luh pehr-soh-NAL shoh-PEENG eh soor rahn-day-VOO oh duh-ZYEM ay-TAHZH
responses.local: Oui, le personal shopping est sur rendez-vous au deuxième étage.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if they can ship purchases to a hotel
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous livrer mes achats à mon hôtel ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-VAY voo lee-VRAY may ah-SHAH ah mohn oh-TEL
phrases.cultural_note: Le Bon Marché offers same-day delivery within Paris and can ship purchases to hotels or internationally. Larger luxury purchases can also be gift-wrapped in the store's distinctive signature packaging, which has become an icon of Parisian style in itself.

responses.english: Yes, we can send your purchases. Ask at customer service.
responses.phonetic: wee, ohn puh ahn-vwah-YAY voz ah-SHAH. duh-mahn-DAY oh sehr-VEES klee-AHN
responses.local: Oui, on peut envoyer vos achats. Demandez au service client.
